name: Parking Configuration & Policy Management
description: Configures parking zones, tariffs, permits, exemptions, dwell rules, and city or operator policies across assets and channels.

name: Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization
description: Adjusts pricing and occupancy strategy using demand, event, and utilization signals.

name: Payment Channel Orchestration
description: Coordinates mobile, kiosk, in-car, partner, permit, and other payment channels through one governed payment-control layer.

name: Access, Permit & LPR Control
description: Manages barrier access, permit validation, LPR flows, and access-event control across parking environments.

name: Enforcement & Compliance Workflows
description: Coordinates parking enforcement, exemptions, citations, evidence, and dispute or compliance workflows.

name: Reservations & Permit Inventory
description: Handles reservable inventory, recurring permits, visitor parking, and premium access products.

name: Operator Analytics & Control Tower
description: Provides a unified operating view across occupancy, yield, compliance, channel mix, and incidents.

name: City Mobility Intelligence
description: Creates a common city-mobility data layer combining parking, curb, transport, and usage signals.

name: Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling
description: Models policy, pricing, and curb interventions against forecast and observed mobility outcomes.

name: Transit Fare & Open Payment Engine
description: Handles open payment, account-based fare logic, capping, and transport-payment orchestration.

name: Device & Validator Management
description: Operates transport validators, vending and handheld devices, configuration, and maintenance readiness.

name: Transit Operations Telemetry
description: Combines transaction, device, alert, and service data into one transport operations view.

name: Fleet & Business Policy Controls
description: Defines employee, driver, visitor, and vehicle parking policies with account and site-level controls.

name: Business Billing, Tagging & Expense Controls
description: Supports centralized billing, cost-center allocation, session tagging, and expense governance.

name: Visitor & Temporary Access Workflows
description: Coordinates guest, contractor, and short-term parking workflows with controlled authorization.

name: Partner API, Sandbox & Certification
description: Provides reusable APIs, test tooling, documentation, and launch workflows for ecosystem integrations.

name: Market Catalog & Operator Rules
description: Publishes market availability, operator-specific rules, and integration constraints in one controlled catalog.

name: Partner Analytics & Revenue Reporting
description: Tracks partner transaction quality, attach, revenue mix, and onboarding performance.

name: Automotive & In-Car Data Services
description: Supports parking, mobility, and payment experiences in connected-car and automotive partner environments.

name: Identity & Access Management
description: Provides authentication, authorization, tenancy, and role control across operators, partners, businesses, and internal teams.

name: Enterprise Integration Layer
description: Offers reusable connectors, canonical models, and event-driven integration with municipal, transport, payment, and partner systems.

name: API Gateway & Developer Experience
description: Provides secure external APIs, throttling, keys, lifecycle governance, and developer-facing controls.

name: Eventing & Process Backbone
description: Streams business events and coordinates asynchronous workflows across parking, transit, partners, and billing.

name: Workflow, Case & Exception Management
description: Supports multi-step back-office workflows, SLA tracking, and coordinated exception handling.

name: Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation
description: Provides the shared transaction ledger, settlement, reconciliation, and financial-control backbone.

name: Communications & Notifications
description: Handles email, SMS, push, and other triggered or operationally managed communications.

name: Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform
description: Creates the common reporting layer for KPI packs, planning analytics, and operational monitoring.

name: Compliance, Privacy & Audit Controls
description: Implements privacy, auditability, financial-control, and regulated operational governance requirements.

name: Observability & Reliability Operations
description: Provides logging, alerting, incident management, service health, and reliability operations.
